'''Ugbuz''' was the alpha-[[Gender/Legends|male]] of the [[Gakfedd tribe|Gakfedd clan]] in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]] who wore a helmet adorned with other [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean's]] ears and wielded an axe made of blast shielding. On [[Pzob/Legends|Pzob]], the Gamorrean was captured by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] battlemoon the ''[[Eye of Palpatine]]''. Brainwashed to become a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] squad leader, he had several encounters with [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]. When he and his warriors were freed, they negotiated with [[Drost Elegin]] to become his personal bodyguards.
